questions.question_text: Mr. Gyan bought a car for $GH? 16,800.00$ and later sold it at $85\%$ of the original cost. He spent $GH? 3,930.75$ from the money he received from the sale of the car and invested the remaining at $18\%$ per annum simple interest. How much interest did he earn in $9$ years?
The locus, $L$ is such that $|PM| = |PM|$. Which of the following best describes $L$?

options.text: It is the locus of points perpendicular to the line $MN$.
It is the locus of points parallel to line $MN$.
It is the circle centre $P$, radius $MN$.
It is the locus of points equidistant from $M$ and $N$.

questions.question_text: A town $P$ is due south of town $Q$ and town $R$ is on a bearing of $125^{\circ}$ from $Q$. If town $R$ is $20$ km due east of $P$, find $|PQ|$.
